name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Sign if you agree: It’s past time that Trump reopen the government
body:
[**Sign the petition to join Sen. Kamala Harris and demand Republican leaders tell Trump to pass the bipartisan resolution to reopen the government now.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/G35Jj/6/0X/r5cs/6fTE0z/v0VYAWNVd/P/P) Activist --

The federal government has been shut down for three weeks now -- marking the joint-longest shutdown in our country's history. Governing by crisis is not an effective way to lead. We need to fight back if we're going to reopen the government and fund essential domestic priorities. It's up to us to stop Trump's vanity project: a hateful, ineffective border wall.

I'm confident that if enough people come together, we can make Republican leaders hear the voices of the American people who are fed up with this manufactured crisis. That's why I'm asking:

[**Sign my petition to Republican leaders demanding they pass a bipartisan resolution that will reopen the government. Your voice is needed in this fight, now more than ever.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/G35Jj/s/0I/r5cs/6fTE0z/65iyk9OlSd/P/P)

Governing by brinkmanship and chaos isn't leadership: it's recklessness. This cynical, partisan, political game is affecting real people's lives. Hundreds of thousands of federal employees, many of whom are living paycheck to paycheck, are facing furloughs. Food assistance benefits for nearly 39 million low-income Americans are under threat.

The American people deserve better than a government that lurches from one crisis to the next, with little to no leadership at the helm. This government shutdown must end as quickly as possible. That's why I'm asking you to make your voice heard today: tell Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and all Republicans to do the right thing.

[**Sign my petition to GOP leaders demanding they tell Trump to pass a bipartisan resolution to reopen the government.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/G35Jj/v/0I/r5cs/6fTE0z/zPgXzw5lOS/P/P)

This is a moment when the beauty of the design of our democracy is being tested. I'm confident that, if enough of us raise our voices together, we will prevail.

Sincerely,

Kamala Harris
U.S. Senator, California ****[Sign the Petition](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/G35Jj/z/0I/r5cs/6fTE0z/6uRzCVjyrg/P/P)****
---

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](https://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNDY4LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjgzNDAwNzA0)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: Laura Dominguez, Our Revolution Rio Grande Valley
subject: Marching with the border communities in Texas
body:
I have been marching with the members of Our Revolution Rio Grande Valley and the border communities in Texas whose towns would be decimated by the border wall.
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a641/bed43eb/82d052a3/75fbadf9/3723164145/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Friends,
For the past year, I have been marching with the members of Our Revolution Rio Grande Valley and the border communities in Texas whose towns would be decimated by the border wall. Trump's border wall affects more than just these communities. 800,000 workers just missed a paycheck due to the government shutdown.
[**Our message needs to be loud and clear: we will not fund the border wall that Trump is holding our democracy hostage to build. Will you make a $5 donation to support our organizing work in Texas and across the country?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a641/bed43eb/82d052a3/75fbadf8/3723164145/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/governmentshutdown?refcode=em190112-full&noskip=true")
800,000 missed checks would go toward mortgages, rent, credit card payments, student loans, putting gas in the car, public transportation, childcare, tuition, food, water, utilities, cell phone payments, and more. Now high-interest payday lenders are moving in because workers have nowhere else to turn. The shutdown over a border wall must end.
A massive grassroots movement is required to make our government work for us, but how big we build this movement depends on you. The Trump administration won't stop trying to divide us up, but if enough of us take action together we will have the power to fight back and win.
**[We're counting on you to help build a political revolution at the grassroots level across our country. Please make a $5 contribution today.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a641/bed43eb/82d052a3/75fbadf8/3723164145/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/governmentshutdown?refcode=em190112-full&noskip=true")**
Thank you for engaging in this struggle - whether you are a government worker, come from an immigrant family, or simply want to see a just America where we all have the opportunity to thrive, your voice matters.
In solidarity,
Laura Dominguez
Group Leader
Our Revolution Rio Grande Valley
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a641/bed43eb/82d052a3/75fbadf8/3723164145/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/governmentshutdown?refcode=em190112-full&noskip=true")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a641/bed43eb/82d052a3/75fbadfb/3723164145/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a641/bed43eb/82d052a3/75fbadfa/3723164145/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a641/bed43eb/82d052a3/75fbade5/3723164145/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a641/bed43eb/82d052a3/75fbade4/3723164145/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Team O'Halleran
subject: demand action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Even though the new Congress is only just over seven days old, Tom has been busy, team.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633c90/1a8421e1/19be07cab/417e7fd5/1353850847/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq12019?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Even though the new Congress is only just over a week old, Tom has been busy, team. He's supporting over 16 bills in the House, including legislation to help defend the Affordable Care Act in court so we can ensure Arizonans with preexisting conditions won't lose coverage or see their insurance prices skyrocket. Tom has also reached across the aisle and is working with Republicans to support a measure to make sure Arizona's veterans get the health care they earned from their service. **But Tom 's first priority in the new Congress is to end this government shutdown -- responsibly and quickly -- so that Arizona families do not continue to suffer because of political gamesmanship.** And the more people who make their voices heard the more likely Congress will act to end this destructive shutdown. [**So click here and join Tom and millions of Americans to demand we reopen the government.**](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633c90/1a8421e1/19be07cab/417e7fd6/1353850847/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MzA3In0=/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/no-more-shutdown?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=85307") Thank you, Team O'Halleran **_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq12019?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_** ** ** ** ** ** ** ** **

| Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
---

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [_clicking here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633c90/1a8421e1/19be07cab/417e7fd8/1353850847/VEsC/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/update-your-information").

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633c90/1a8421e1/19be07cab/417e7fd9/1353850847/VEsD/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633c90/1a8421e1/19be07cab/417e7fdb/1353850847/VEsA/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").
